title: Version 2.7 — Mailvetter Hardening
flowcharts:
flowchart TD
    stage["2.7.x Mailvetter Hardening"]
    contract["Contract"]
    service["Service"]
    surface["Surface"]
    data["Data"]
    ops["Ops"]
    gate["Release gate"]
    stage --> contract --> gate
    stage --> service --> gate
    stage --> surface --> gate
    stage --> data --> gate
    stage --> ops --> gate

flowchart LR
    edge["API ingress"] --> rlim["Redis rate limiter"]
    rlim --> q["job queue"]
    q --> w["workers"]
    w --> idem["idempotent bulk create"]
    idem --> mig["migrations via pipeline"]
    mig --> wh["webhook HMAC with dedicated secret"]
    wh --> dlq["dead letter plus alert"]
    dlq --> gate["2.7 release gate"]
